tasks.subject: Task 1: codex_local internal data enrichment
tasks.description:
**Goal:** codex_local classifies windows by duration, exposes 5h/weekly/worst accessors, and parses token/context/credits into #[serde(skip)] internal fields (parsed + tested, never serialized).

**Files:** crates/codex_local/src/{types.rs,parser.rs,lib.rs}, crates/codex_local/SCHEMA-NOTES.md, and add `tokens: None, credits: None` to the 9 literal CodexQuotaSnapshot constructors (tauri_sink.rs:577, json_output.rs:480, sinks.rs:283, tui.rs:708, statusline.rs:323/362, render.rs:857/1489, snapshot_file.rs:211).

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p codex_local && cargo build --workspace

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/codex_local/src/types.rs","crates/codex_local/src/parser.rs","crates/codex_local/src/lib.rs","crates/codex_local/SCHEMA-NOTES.md","src-tauri/src/tauri_sink.rs","crates/balanze_cli/src/json_output.rs","crates/balanze_cli/src/sinks.rs","crates/balanze_cli/src/tui.rs","crates/balanze_cli/src/statusline.rs","crates/balanze_cli/src/render.rs","crates/state_coordinator/src/snapshot_file.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo nextest run -p codex_local && cargo build --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["kind() classifies 300/10080/other","five_hour/weekly/worst_window select by duration","tokens/credits not serialized","burn Some only with >=2 monotonic samples","credits string parsed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Frontend codexQuota builders
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add codexWindowsByKind() and codexQuota() to quota.ts mirroring anthropicQuota(), classifying windows by duration.

**Files:** src/lib/presentation/quota.ts, src/lib/presentation/quota.test.ts

**Verify:** bunx vitest run src/lib/presentation/quota.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/presentation/quota.ts","src/lib/presentation/quota.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "bunx vitest run src/lib/presentation/quota.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5h headline + weekly secondary on two-window plans","go single weekly window becomes headline","null snapshot -> null"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Render weekly window in GridView + CardsView
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Popover (GridView) shows a 5h headline + `weekly X% · plan` secondary; cards view (CardsView) shows one card per present Codex window.

**Files:** src/lib/components/GridView.svelte (import codexQuota; cq derived; replace lines 90-94), src/lib/components/CardsView.svelte (import codexWindowsByKind; rebuild codexWindows lines 110-115)

**Verify:** bun run check; visual in bun run tauri dev

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/components/GridView.svelte","src/lib/components/CardsView.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "bun run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GridView headline=5h, secondary=weekly X% · plan","CardsView one card per present window","bun run check clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Tray Codex 5h/weekly split
tasks.description:
**Goal:** TrayView splits Codex into codex_5h/codex_weekly; title shows worst Codex window; tooltip shows `5h X%  wk Y%`.

**Files:** src-tauri/src/tauri_sink.rs (TrayView struct, from_snapshot fold-by-duration, has_data, codex_worst(), worst() array, tray_title, tray_tooltip, codex_with_util helper + new codex_5h_weekly helper/test)

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p balanze (confirm src-tauri package name); bun run tauri dev

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src-tauri/src/tauri_sink.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo nextest run -p balanze", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TrayView codex_5h/codex_weekly folded by duration","title = worst codex window","tooltip splits 5h/wk","existing tray tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: CLI, statusline, and TUI worst-window + labels
tasks.description:
**Goal:** CLI full render labels windows 5h/weekly by kind; statusline and TUI show the worst Codex window instead of primary.

**Files:** crates/balanze_cli/src/render.rs:327-349 (windows() loop labeled by kind), crates/balanze_cli/src/statusline.rs:198-201 (worst_window) + new test, crates/balanze_cli/src/tui.rs:345 (worst_window gauge)

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p balanze_cli

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/balanze_cli/src/render.rs","crates/balanze_cli/src/statusline.rs","crates/balanze_cli/src/tui.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo nextest run -p balanze_cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["render labels windows 5h/weekly by kind","statusline + tui use worst_window","new worst-window statusline test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Docs lockstep + full validation + PR
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update user-facing docs for the richer Codex column, run the full validation matrix, and open the PR.

**Files:** README.md, docs/PRD.md

**Verify:** cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo nextest run --workspace && cargo fmt --all -- --check && bun run check && bunx vitest run

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md","docs/PRD.md"], "verifyCommand": "cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo nextest run --workspace && cargo fmt --all -- --check && bun run check && bunx vitest run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["docs updated for 5h+weekly","full validation matrix green","PR opened"]}
```
